{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220727418AFD5DB449722148F1B4"}"},"total":1448},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577821642836247320","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真心评价这本书就是精品，作者文采特别好，人物修饰，画面描写不是千篇一律，算是我心中模拟文上上品了，文中的角色比如瑶池，天璇，人物立体形象，有血肉，有情感，还有我想问一下作者，那些女主什么时候回归，想看后悔，追夫，修罗场，同时希望后续的模拟质量依然优质，玖佃怡心，不为过","text_exts":[{"e":109,"s":106,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741356612148F1B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227577821642836247320%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227535450300774108185%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764351467,"group_id":"7535450300774108185","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5dB+gBa1VgIVDTaHFy5CCw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d7650b42d78d4b7ea79b8adb6fe03348~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705668&x-signature=lg3bWy%2FNkWk8OqKGVZgNRUrdEcs%3D","user_id":"189581296141480","user_name":"挨打游戏的磨针咯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"189581296141480","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535450300774108185","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌+系统+后悔+多女主+修罗场】
人在高武世界，觉醒反派角色系统，能够通过穿越异世界扮演反派，完成任务后抽取扮演反派的天赋。
……
任务一，扮演杀死女主家人的首席教授，收留女主作为弟子悉心培养，最终因事情败露被女主杀死。
“我最爱的老师救了我，可我却杀死了他。”
任务二，扮演爱而不得的舔狗男配，向女主献殷勤并构陷男主，最后被男主强势斩杀。
“只有失去了才懂得珍惜，原来师兄之于我，就如同水之于鱼。”
任务三，扮演潜入学院的罪族余孽，意图解除罪印释放魔剑，因身份败露被处决。
“都是我们的错，但凡我们能够多信任他一点……他不是罪人，我们才是。”
任务四，扮演春秋战国的强势霸主，穷兵黩武吞并诸侯国，却死于后宫妃嫔之手。
“他是暴君，亦是明君，而我们亲手毁掉了这个太平盛世。”
任务五，扮演邪恶组织的幕后老大，被主角团一路追击，为自己的伟大事业陪葬。
“神与魔，正与邪，我已经分不清了……”
……
每一个任务的背后，都隐含着世界的真相。
不明真相的罗川，带着反派天赋回到高武世界。
留在原来世界的女主们，当知道真相后，不禁流下悔恨的泪水。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/881efe02f60e00f6ce21fb78b9b8e4bb","author":"问君六月","author_id":"","book_id":"7535450300774108185","book_name":"我就演个戏，女主怎么都赖上我了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7539975603311624729","read_count":"106453","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"719144"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"288","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,多女主,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/74ce504dea1188d0cb34b4e5b9afedaf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319661&x-signature=RrjrB8W5sF1KgG92L38VxiaNRTI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1308877122962067","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220727418AFD5DB449722148F1B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":22,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10470,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":46815},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612300801504379710","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书绝对可以的，评分绝对低了，这本是真好看，目前是4个副本，加一个主世界，一个副本简单跳过，但是大致也讲了，第2个修仙副本，我觉得看着挺爽的，这个作者他对女主的塑造，我感觉很好啊，第3个校园异能，作者写出了日本高中轻小说的感觉最后在拯救世界。
然后二刷了第1个世界，展示了男主如何通过柴刀剧情，也很精彩，第4个嬴政副本还没结束，可能还没结束的缘故，我感觉没有前三个副本好看。总结作者很会塑造女主，这本女主真的很多，性格都一样，男主很有人格魅力"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772379384,"group_id":"7535450300774108185","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6WYbQZn8z/aluek/s8ckDQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"97918932445","user_name":"京城酒店的张子陵强"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97918932445","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535450300774108185","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌+系统+后悔+多女主+修罗场】
